name: Risotto Milanese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they become transparent.
2. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, add the Arborio rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring to coat the grains with the oil.
4. Stir in the saffron threads and white wine. Reduce the heat to medium and let the mixture simmer until it reduces by about half, approximately 15 minutes.
5. Gradually add the chicken stock, a cup at a time, allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding more. Continue this process until all the liquid is incorporated and the rice is creamy, stirring constantly for about 15-18 minutes until the rice reaches an al dente texture.
6. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the butter and Parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.
